hypothesis: A ∆-learning model conditioned on the identity, formal d‑electron count, and local coordination number of the primary 3d transition‑metal center (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni) will reduce the HSE06 band‑gap prediction MAE for MOFs containing those metals to below 0.25 eV on an independent test set, outperforming the unconditioned ∆-learning model.
